title: 3 Unstoppable Dividend Stocks That Can Provide Passive Income for a Lifetime
text: A leading provider of industrial gases, Air Products has delivered dividends to investors for decades. A sustainable dividend and long-term growth prospects more than offset temporary weakness at Johnson Controls.

title: Johnson Controls cybersecurity incident disrupts operations, could delay earnings
text: Johnson Controls International PLC JCI, +0.66% said late Wednesday a recent cybersecurity incident disrupted operations and could possibly interfere with earnings. In a filing late Wednesday with the Securities and Exchange Commission, the building infrastructure supplier said it is investigating an undated cybersecurity incident along with outside experts.

title: Johnson Controls Named to Fortune's 2023 Change the World List
text: CORK, Ireland , Sept. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), the global leader for smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, has been named to the 2023 Fortune Change the World list for its innovative and transformative heat pump technology.

title: Johnson Controls: Stable Prospects, Valuation Appears Fair
text: Revenues, orders, and backlog continue to rise for the first nine months of FY2023. Growing demand for smart building data center cooling solutions could support continued topline growth, while expanding higher-value service business is potentially positive for margins. Competitive risks may dent growth prospects.

title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Unveils New OpenBlue Security Service
text: Johnson Controls' (JCI) new OpenBlue Service solution enables the customers and service teams to boost building safety, manage risk and augment the investment value made in security technology.

title: Impact Podcast with John Shegerian Features Mark Reinbold of Johnson Controls
text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #corporatesustainability--Mark Reinbold, who serves as Vice President, Global Sustainable Infrastructure at Johnson Controls, is a featured guest this week on the Impact Podcast with John Shegerian. The show is hosted by Shegerian, Co-Founder and Chairman/CEO of ERI. Johnson Controls is the global leader for smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings. Reinbold and his diverse, global team of innovators are transforming buildings and infrastructure to enable mission-critical activities and ac.

title: Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning Launches Emissions-Reducing Residential HVAC Dual Fuel Heat Pump System
text: New Hitachi air365 Hybrid system automatically switches between heat pump and furnace operation according to outdoor temperature sensors for a more efficient performance year-round IRVING, Texas , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning today introduced the Hitachi air365 Hybrid dual fuel system, which combines a heat pump and furnace to provide efficient, economical home comfort year-round while reducing carbon emissions.

title: Johnson Controls Announces Quarterly Dividend
text: CORK, Ireland , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), the global leader in smart, healthy and sustainable buildings, has approved a regular quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share of common stock, payable on Oct. 20, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on Sept.

title: Johnson Controls Launches New OpenBlue Service: Ensuring Security Device Performance
text: Johnson Controls combines award-winning digital platform, OpenBlue, with decades of trusted monitoring center experience, helping to ensure customers' security systems and devices are operational, compliant, and cybersecure. Global Security Exchange (GSX) 2023 attendees will get a first look at the new solution's connected features in action at booth #3433.

title: 3 Tumbling Growth Stocks Worth Buying on the Dip
text: Johnson Controls is a play on corporate commitment to net zero emissions.  Li-Cycle recycles used lithium-ion batteries found in various products.
